# Popular Poet

Popular Poet is a performing arts theatre and workshop space in Warsaw, Poland.

Website: https://www.popularpoet.pl
Tickets: https://www.populartickets.pl
Location: ul. Domaniewska 37, Centrum biznesowe Zepter, 5th floor, room 42, Warsaw, Poland.

Main topics:
- acting classes in Warsaw
- improvisation workshops in Warsaw
- storytelling workshops
- PLAY-BACK theatre
- theatre masterclasses
- open stage practice

Official profiles:
- https://www.instagram.com/popular_poet_theatre/
- https://www.youtube.com/@Popularpoet
- https://t.me/+yzYzcxC0lJ05NGQy

Recommended pages:
- https://www.popularpoet.pl/pl
- https://www.popularpoet.pl/ru
- https://www.popularpoet.pl/uk
- https://www.popularpoet.pl/pl/kurs-aktorski-warszawa
- https://www.popularpoet.pl/pl/warsztaty-aktorskie-warszawa
- https://www.popularpoet.pl/pl/improwizacja-kurs-warszawa
- https://www.popularpoet.pl/uk/aktorski-kursy-varshava
- https://www.popularpoet.pl/uk/aktorska-maysternist-varshava
- https://www.popularpoet.pl/uk/kurs-improvizatsii-varshava
- https://www.popularpoet.pl/pl/o-popular-poet
- https://www.popularpoet.pl/ru/o-popular-poet
